issue_summary: Fix javadoc and method return type
javadoc_before: /** * Return an Iterator for the lines in a Reader. * * @param reader the Reader to read from, not null * @return an Iterator of the lines in the reader, never null * @throws NullPointerException if the reader is null * @since Commons IO 1.2 */
javadoc_after: /** * Return an Iterator for the lines in a Reader. * Please read the javadoc of {@link LineIterator} to understand * whether you should close the iterator. * The file is closed if an exception is thrown. * * @param reader the Reader to read from, not null * @return an Iterator of the lines in the reader, never null * @throws NullPointerException if the reader is null * @since Commons IO 1.2 */
